findings: Breadth basket directly addressed Candidate 004 top1 dependency by moving from 14 to 37 trades.
Ex-best-symbol weighted net improved from Candidate 004 negative to 0.094271.
Top-symbol concentration remained too high at 0.360, with best symbol FCEL.
Weighted net remained positive at 0.147262, win rate 0.595, max drawdown -0.029436.
Benchmark-relative interpretation remained negative versus both SPY and IWM in the trial window.
Candidate 005 is a better research lead than Candidate 004, but still not promotable under trial-limited history.
